def positive_protocol_used_in_isinstance_without_runtime_checkable():
    rule_id = "protocol_used_in_isinstance_without_runtime_checkable"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "typing.Protocol used in isinstance() call without @runtime_checkable decorator."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
